history.text:
[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: A mobile game inventory or store interface fills the screen over a blurred, dim background with a car-like vehicle partially visible at the bottom.

Main Subject:
The main focus is a grid of item thumbnails on the left side, showing various clothing and character items arranged in multiple rows and columns, with a highlighted selection and small star icons on some tiles. A yellow-outlined category label appears at the top left, and a title bar above the grid shows the current section name.

Setting:
The scene appears to be a video game UI overlay on top of a dark, indoor or sheltered environment; the background is blurred and contains a car-like vehicle shape near the bottom. The lighting is low and the overall color palette is dark purple and black with neon-colored accents.

Visual Details:
On the left, a vertical menu lists categories in white text on a dark background, with a yellow highlight behind the “FASHION” label at the top. The item grid contains multiple items with varied thumbnail colors, including pants, characters, and other accessories. Purple and blue glow accents highlight some selections, and several items show small star markers near the bottom of their tiles. On the right side, there is a panel with a circular arrow icon and additional text, along with small circular and icon buttons along the bottom right edge. A translucent dark message bar stretches across the lower center of the screen.

Visible Text:
FASHION
NEW
EMOTE
SKILL SKIN
POSTUR
COLLECTION
KENDARAN
PROFILE
LAINNYA
SEMUA TIER
NARUTO
ONE PUNCH MAN
DAlAM ANTRIAN
SEMUA ITEM YANG DIMILIKI
Shorts (Putih)
Suara panggilan dan notifikasi akan dinonaktifkan
VAULT

Practical Summary:
The image shows a game menu screen where a player browses a grid of fashion and character items. A dark UI overlay with highlighted categories and a lower notification-style message sits over a blurred, car-like background.

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
